subcodes.title: Public address given on 1912-08-16
subcodes.first_line: Every subject presented to a thoughtful audience must be supported by rational proofs.... We declare that love is the cause of the existence of all phenomena
subcodes.subjects: @development of capacity and readiness, @love of God, @the human soul, @power of the mind over nature, @existence; immortality of the human soul, @proofs of the Manifestations of God
